MOTTO: Brighten Up Workspace, Simplify Your Process
PRICING_DESCRIPTION: Simple plans. Simple prices. Only pay for what you really need. All plans come with our 24/7 customer support. Change or cancel your plan at any time.

AGENCY_DETAILS.CREATE_AGENCY_DESCRIPTION: Lets create an agency for you business. You can edit agency settings later from the agency settings tab.
AGENCY_DETAILS.UPDATE_AGENCY_DESCRIPTION: You can update the agency information here.
AGENCY_DETAILS.AGENCY_DELETE_DESCRIPTION: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the Agency and all related data.
AGENCY_DETAILS.AGENCY_LOGO_DESCRIPTION: This is the logo of your agency.

WORKSPACE_DETAILS.CREATE_WORKSACE_DESCRIPTION: Create a new workspace to collaborate with your team.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.DESCRIPTION: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.ENTER_RESET_CODE: Enter the password reset code that was sent to your email address. If you didn't receive a code, you can request a new one.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SECOND_FA_REQUIRED: 2FA is required, but this UI does not handle that. Please
FORGOT_PASSWORD.PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS: Password reset successful. You can now sign in with your new password.
